creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
The upstream commit that causes this problem is here:

http://hg.openjdk.java.net/jdk/hs/rev/35e11b657728

They apparently used to have a r/w emptyStack variable in their memTracker.cpp, but due to some issue with a "minimal build" (whatever that is), they started explicitly initializing it using placement new.

However, they also moved the variable into the NativeCallStack class, but as a static const member!  That simply cannot be right in any way.
